scenario_name: ZONE_A Gas Leak - Full Demo Sequence
description: The exact sequence the live demo replays. Matches critical_scenario.csv timing for ZONE_A. Total runtime: ~11 minutes at 30-second ticks.

timeline.narration: Baseline readings. Everything normal in ZONE_A.
Slight upward drift, still within safe range.
Hot Work permit approved in ZONE_A - a Confined Space permit is already active here. Compound risk engine flags the overlap.
Worker enters ZONE_A while gas trend continues rising and two hazardous permits are active simultaneously.
Gas concentration spikes sharply. Similarity Engine matches this pattern to the Visakhapatnam 2025 incident profile.
Emergency Orchestrator triggers automatic shutdown protocol and evacuation alert for ZONE_A.

key_talking_points: Compound risk detection: two overlapping hazardous permits flagged automatically
Historical similarity: matched to a real past incident in seconds
Time from first warning sign to shutdown: under 6 minutes
Every step logged for the incident replay and report generator
